hero.description: Passionate about creating beautiful, functional web experiences. I specialize in building full-stack applications with modern technologies and integrating AI solutions to solve real-world problems.

projects.title: Projects & Experience
projects.experienceDesc: My journey so far includes personal projects I built from scratch and two freelance projects on Mostaql that gave me my first taste of real client work. I am still growing in this field, but I show up with curiosity, dedication, and a genuine love for building things that work well. you can check out my projects and certificates on Github, Mostaql, and Linkedin.
projects.certificatetwo: Harvard CS50 With Python and JavaScript
projects.ProjectoneDesc: Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Next-Auth for authentication. It features a responsive design, dark mode, and a user-friendly interface to showcase my portfolio and blog.
projects.ProjecttwoDesc: Engineered a full-stack application with user authentication. You can add posts, delete them and you can change from dark mode to light mode.

services.title: Services
services.webDevelopmentDesc: Building responsive, modern websites with cutting-edge technologies and best practices.
services.fullStackDesc: End-to-end development from frontend UI to backend infrastructure and databases.
services.aiIntegrationDesc: Integrating artificial intelligence and machine learning into your applications.
services.automationDesc: Automating repetitive tasks and workflows to increase productivity and efficiency.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.description: Real messages only — these go straight to my inbox and I will reply as soon as possible.

footer.designed: Designed and developed by Mahmoud Elrashedy

books.title: Summarized Books
books.question: What are these books?
books.answer: These are books I have personally read and carefully noted so I can return to their core lessons whenever I need a refresher. If you have already read them, these summaries are a perfect tool for your revision. If you haven't, these highlights offer a strong foundation—though I highly recommend reading the books in full to truly capture the depth and benefit of the author's experience.

socialmedia.heading: My Social Media
socialmedia.description: Welcome to my social corner. I'm Mahmoud — EL Rashedy. I create Personal content and content that break down Physics, Math, and Computer Science in a way that actually makes sense. No boring lectures. No complicated stuff. Just real, simple, and sometimes funny explanations. Whether you're a student, a curious mind, or just someone who wants to learn something new — you're in the right place.New videos regularly. Let's grow together. 🔥
